summary: Frontend E2E testing for ATELIER 44 fashion e-commerce completed. All 12 requested scenarios pass: home page loads (marquee + hero + featured cards), Shop All nav, category filter + sort, header search redirects to /shop?search=trench, product detail with sign-in toast when not logged, user registration + auto-login, add-to-cart while logged in (drawer opens, cart count updates), full checkout with mock payment (order confirmation shown with confirmation number C637D64F), order history in /account, admin login + admin panel + add new product (QA Test Coat visible in table), delete admin product (row removed), mobile viewport 375x800 (hamburger opens mobile-menu with nav links).
critical_code_review_comments: Occasional net::ERR_CONNECTION_CLOSED warnings in console for image assets — not blocking functionality but worth investigating (may be intermittent CDN/image URL). Ignored for now.
test_credentials: admin@atelier.com / Admin@1234; ephemeral users created via /register during test run
seed_data_creation: Registered ephemeral users pw_user_<rand>@test.com and pw_cart_<rand>@test.com. Created admin product 'QA Test Coat' and deleted within the same run.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All frontend flows verified against public REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL. Admin form has fields: admin-form-name (input), admin-form-category (input), admin-form-price (input), admin-form-images (textarea), admin-form-featured (input), admin-form-save (button). Confirmation flow renders [data-testid='order-confirmation'] with 'Confirmation N° <code>'. Cart drawer animates 200ms — wait ~1.5s after add. Mobile menu-btn only appears at <768px viewport.
